product_overview: Glunova is a patient-facing health platform focused on diabetes prevention and management, combining AI-powered food analysis, personalized health roadmaps, educational content, and remote consultations. The product provides secure authentication, an interactive dashboard, and integrated booking/payment flows.
core_goals: Enable secure sign-up and sign-in for patients and doctors
Provide actionable, personalized health insights (BMI, HbA1c, risk assessment)
Offer NutriScan AI vision to analyze meals and return nutrition + diabetes-safety verdicts
Support remote consultation booking and secure payment flows
Deliver an educational hub and interactive roadmap to guide behavior change
Provide an always-available AI assistant for quick health-related questions

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow patients and doctors to register and login securely, then access protected areas like the dashboard and booking.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /register -> Fill registration fields -> Click Register button -> See /dashboard
Navigate to /register-doctor -> Fill doctor registration fields -> Click Register button -> See registration success message
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill incorrect password -> Click Login button -> See authentication error message

features.name: Personalized Onboarding (Health Profile & Risk Assessment)
features.description: Capture baseline health data (height, weight, BMI, HbA1c, medical history) and surface an automated diabetes risk assessment.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> Click Edit Health Profile -> Fill height field -> Fill weight field -> Fill HbA1c field -> Click Save -> See risk assessment summary
Navigate to /profile -> Click Edit Health Profile -> Leave HbA1c field blank -> Click Save -> See validation error message

features.name: Health Dashboard
features.description: Central overview of health metrics, charts, and quick navigation to roadmap and other tools.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View health summary charts -> Click weight metric -> See detailed weight history view
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click Navigate to /roadmap -> See interactive roadmap
Navigate to /dashboard -> Charts fail to load -> See error state with retry button -> Click retry -> Charts load successfully

features.name: NutriScan (AI Vision)
features.description: Upload food photos to receive a nutritional breakdown (calories, protein, carbs, fats) and a diabetes-safety verdict from AI.
user_flows: Navigate to /vision -> Click Upload image -> Select photo file -> Click Analyze button -> See nutritional breakdown and health verdict
Navigate to /vision -> Click Upload image -> Select unsupported file type -> See file type error message

features.name: Educational Hub
features.description: Browse curated, persona-tailored health articles and save favorites for later reference.
user_flows: Navigate to /education -> Browse article list -> Click on an article -> See full article content
Navigate to /education -> Click on an article -> Article fails to load -> See error message and retry option
Navigate to /education -> Open article -> Click Save to Favorites -> See save confirmation

features.name: AI Chat Assistant (Floating)
features.description: A floating AI chat component available on key pages to ask quick health questions and get instant responses.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> Click floating chat icon -> Type message to AI -> Click send -> See AI response
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click floating chat icon -> Type message to AI -> Click send -> See network error -> See retry option

features.name: Online Consultation (Doctor Discovery, Booking, Payment)
features.description: Search for doctors, schedule appointments, optionally attach images for context, and complete payment for consults.
user_flows: Navigate to /doctors -> Search for doctors -> Select doctor -> Click Book appointment -> Navigate to /booking -> Select appointment time -> Click Proceed to payment -> Navigate to /payment -> Complete payment -> See booking confirmation
Navigate to /doctors -> Search for doctors -> Select appointment time that is no longer available -> See time slot unavailable error -> Choose alternate time
Navigate to /booking -> Click Attach image -> Select image file -> Click Upload -> See upload success confirmation

features.name: Interactive Roadmap
features.description: A dynamic, goal-oriented task list with milestone tracking and gamified progress visualization to encourage healthy habits.
user_flows: Navigate to /roadmap -> View task list -> Click a task -> Mark task complete -> See progress updated and milestone unlocked
Navigate to /roadmap -> Attempt to mark task complete -> See sync error -> Task remains incomplete and shows retry option

features.name: Transaction History
features.description: View past payments and consultation receipts so users can track spending and verify past services.
user_flows: Navigate to /riwayat-transaksi -> See list of transactions -> Click a transaction -> See transaction details and receipt
Navigate to /riwayat-transaksi -> No transactions found -> See empty state message with guidance to book consultations

tech_stack.ui_library: Radix UI, Lucide React, Framer Motion, Recharts

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Login and Registration for users and doctors

features.name: Health Dashboard
features.description: Overview of user health metrics and roadmap

features.name: NutriScan (AI Vision)
features.description: scan food photos and get nutritional analysis

features.name: Educational Hub
user_interactions: Click on an article to read full content

features.name: AI Chat Assistant
features.description: Floating AI chat for health assistance
